column1: # zh-TW / English mixed-writing convention dataset (151 cases)

column5: Motivating bug. Colon bound to the English label stays halfwidth ASCII with a space AFTER, never fullwidth ：. The space here is Western spacing carried by the ':' token, not CJK autospacing.
Motivating bug. The hyphen sits inside a digit-hyphen-digit literal run; it is never read as zhuyin ㄦ and never widened to fullwidth. wrong=7兒11

column3: Chinese lead-in 例如 + colon + 貓、狗
column5: Colon bound to a Chinese label is fullwidth ： with zero surrounding space; the enumeration comma is fullwidth 、.

column3: Chinese label 項目 + colon + 你好
column5: Contrast to Expected: — a Han-owned colon is fullwidth. wrong=項目:你好

column3: 我喜歡貓 + comma + 也喜歡狗
column5: Comma inside a Chinese clause is fullwidth. wrong=我喜歡貓,也喜歡狗

column3: 他說「stay hungry, stay foolish」 (comma inside English phrase within Chinese quote)
column5: The comma belongs to the English phrase → halfwidth; the quotation marks belong to the Chinese sentence → fullwidth Taiwan corner brackets.
Preceding token is English but the sentence is Chinese, so the terminal period is fullwidth 。. wrong=我用的是 Python.
Terminal period closes a Chinese sentence ending in an English acronym → fullwidth 。. No autospace before PTT.

column3: 這句話對嗎 + ？ after English word 'OK'
column5: Question mark terminates a Chinese sentence → fullwidth ？ despite adjacent English. wrong=這樣OK嗎?

column3: 「Stay hungry, stay foolish.」 (whole quoted unit is English)
column5: The terminated unit is entirely English, so its terminal period stays halfwidth; only the outer quotes (Chinese context) are fullwidth 「」.
zh-TW outer quotes are corner brackets 「」, not zh-CN "". wrong=這是"細節"

column3: 他說 + 「 + Stay hungry + 」 (quoting English inside Chinese)
column5: Even when quoting an English phrase in a Chinese sentence, use 「」; nested would be 『』. wrong=他說『Stay hungry』

column3: 外層引用內含 nested: 他說 「我讀了『論語』」
column5: Taiwan nesting: outer 「」, inner 『』 (opposite of zh-CN).

column3: commit 'Item 1,' (halfwidth comma) then later type zhuyin 這是清單
column5: Already-committed halfwidth comma is NOT re-widened when Chinese appears after. wrong=Item 1，這是清單
No auto-capitalization. wrong=Hello
Colon binds to a number run → halfwidth literal, never fullwidth ：. wrong=16：9
Time colon stays halfwidth. wrong=3：30
Hyphen inside a model-name literal, never zhuyin ㄦ. wrong=GPT兒4
Acronym-number literal; hyphen halfwidth, never ㄦ. wrong=COVID兒19

column3: 買了 iPhone + ，很貴 + 。 (English word abuts Chinese comma)
column5: Comma and terminal period belong to the Chinese clause → fullwidth, hugging with zero space even though iPhone precedes the comma. wrong=我買了 iPhone,很貴.
No spaces around fullwidth ：「」. wrong=他說： 「hello 」
Fullwidth comma and exclamation hug neighbors; no space injected around them or at the Han↔Latin boundary. wrong=剛買了一部iPhone ，好開心 ！

column3: TODO + : + 買菜 (English label colon before Chinese)
column5: Colon bound to an English label/identifier stays halfwidth with a trailing space. wrong=TODO：買菜
$19.99 is one literal token (internal '.' not fullwidth); trailing Chinese-sentence period is fullwidth 。. wrong=價格是 $19。99。
Percent sign glued to the digit run, halfwidth; no autospace to Han. wrong=折扣 50 % 的商品
Version dots stay inside the halfwidth literal; the clause comma is fullwidth. wrong=版本 v1.2.3，請更新 → wrong variant v1。2。3
Phone-number hyphens are literal halfwidth, never ㄦ. wrong=02兒1234兒5678
Whole URL is one passthrough literal: colon, slashes, dots and hyphen all stay halfwidth. wrong=連到 https：//example。com/7兒11 這頁
Email is atomic literal (@ and . halfwidth); terminal question mark of the Chinese sentence is fullwidth ？.
Parentheses wrapping Chinese content are fullwidth （）with no surrounding space. wrong=(見附註)

column3: 英文縮寫括註 使用 (API) 一詞
column5: Parentheses hugging a purely English token stay halfwidth. Divergence: formal Chinese prose may prefer fullwidth （API）; halfwidth is the software/web default for an English-only parenthetical.
Enumeration comma 、 (dun-hao) for listing Chinese items, distinct from clause comma ，. wrong=清單:蘋果,香蕉,橘子.

column3: 破折號插入：這件事——我早就知道——很嚴重
column4: 這件事——我早就知道——很嚴重
column5: Chinese dash is the fullwidth em-dash pair ——, not a hyphen. Distinct from the digit-hyphen literal case.
Chinese ellipsis is the six-dot fullwidth …… form. wrong=他猶豫了很久...

column3: 分號並列：他要買書；她要買筆
column5: Semicolon between Chinese clauses is fullwidth ；. wrong=他要買書;她要買筆
Same '-' key, but here it completes a valid zhuyin syllable (final ㄦ) with no alnum neighbor, so zhuyin wins. Contrast with 7-11. wrong=5k4-
Preserve the user-typed halfwidth range tilde; do not auto-convert to fullwidth ～ and never to ㄦ. Divergence: 教育部手冊 prescribes fullwidth 甲式—/乙式～ for formal print.
Two time literals joined by a halfwidth range separator; colons and tilde all stay halfwidth.
Motivating bug. The '-' key doubles as zhuyin ㄦ; flanked by digits on both sides the run is a number run, so ASCII '-' wins. Must NEVER be 7兒11.
Letters flank the dash → English run, halfwidth literal hyphen, never ㄦ.

column3: keys: W i [ㄦ/'-' key] F i
column5: Brand/acronym hyphen stays literal halfwidth.

column3: keys: C O V I D [ㄦ/'-' key] 1 9
column5: Letter-run then digit-run around the dash; whole thing is one passthrough token.

column3: keys: e [ㄦ/'-' key] m a i l
column5: Single leading letter still counts as English context for the flanked dash.
Here '-' IS zhuyin ㄦ: a valid zhuyin syllable parses and no alnum flanks it, so zhuyin wins. Contrast set with 7-11.
Tone digits 3/4/6/7 do NOT count as English context, so the final ㄦ survives.
Colon flanked by digits → number run, halfwidth ':' literal, never fullwidth ：.
Multiple internal dashes all stay literal in one number token.

column3: URL: h t t p s [':'] / / e x a m p l e [.] c o m / 7 [ㄦ/'-'] 1 1
column5: Whole URL is one passthrough run: ':' stays ':', '.' stays '.', '-' stays '-', never ：。ㄦ.
'.' inside an identifier is a literal dot, not zhuyin ㄡ, not fullwidth 。

column3: zhuyin/Han run active, then press comma key
column5: Default width in a Han run is fullwidth — no manual 全形 mode switch needed.

column3: English/number run active, then press comma key
column5: Same physical key emits halfwidth when the active run is English/number.

column3: 我喜歡貓 [comma] 也喜歡狗
column5: Comma bound to a Chinese clause is fullwidth with zero surrounding space.

column3: E x p e c t e d [':' key] (space) 你 好
column5: Motivating bug. Colon bound to the English label 'Expected' stays halfwidth ASCII with a trailing space; must NOT be Expected：你好.

column3: 項 目 [':' key] 你 好 (Chinese label)
column5: Colon after a Han label is fullwidth ：with no surrounding space — the mirror image of the Expected: case.

column3: 時 間 [':' key] 三 點
column5: Fullwidth colon after Han; contrast with time 3:30 which is halfwidth.

column3: T O D O [':' key] (space) 買 菜
column5: Colon after an English/UI label token stays halfwidth even though 買菜 follows.

column3: r a t i o (space) 1 6 [':' key] 9
column5: Ratio colon between digits is halfwidth.
Sentence-terminal override: the period closes an overall-Chinese sentence, so fullwidth 。even though the last token is English. Space before Python was user-typed.
Terminal period on a Chinese sentence ending in an acronym → fullwidth 。 (no user space, so PTT stays glued).
Terminal ? on a Chinese sentence → fullwidth ？

column3: self-contained English run: R e a l l y [? key]
column5: A terminal mark closing an all-English unit stays halfwidth.

column3: 他說 [「] S t a y (space) h u n g r y [comma] (space) s t a y (space) f o o l i s h [.] [」]
column5: Inside a quoted all-English clause both the comma and the terminal period stay halfwidth; the Taiwan corner brackets around it are fullwidth.

column3: 他說 [「] s t a y (space) h u n g r y [」]
column5: Quotation in Chinese context uses fullwidth corner brackets 「」 even around English, no surrounding spaces.
Comma bound to the Chinese clause is fullwidth despite abutting 'iPhone'; terminal period fullwidth. Space before iPhone was user-typed.

column3: commit 'Item 1' + halfwidth comma, then LATER type zhuyin 這是清單
column5: No retroactive re-widening: the already-committed halfwidth comma is not re-widened just because Chinese appears afterward.

column3: Shift-forced English run 'OK', then zhuyin 了
column5: Passthrough English defaults to halfwidth and glues to the following Han with no auto-space.

column3: Caps Lock 英數 mode, type 'HELLO'
column5: Sustained English mode = halfwidth, case preserved.
No auto-capitalization; output verbatim halfwidth.
Only when the user explicitly picks 全形 do letters/digits widen; this is the opt-in exception to the halfwidth default.

column3: keys: 我 用 i P h o n e (no space typed)
column5: Segmenter-driven default emits verbatim: no inline auto-space at the Han↔Latin boundary; the ¼-em gap is the renderer's job.

column3: keys: 我 用 (space) i P h o n e (space typed by user)
column5: A user-typed space is preserved verbatim — faithful transcription, not auto-spacing.

column3: keys: 買 了 3 個 (digit glued to Han, no space typed)
column5: Halfwidth digit glued to Han with no injected space; never 買了 3 個.
Arabic numerals half-width, glued to Han with no injected space (no autospace).

column3: types 第 then 3 then 名
column5: Never full-width ３; digit hugs Han on both sides.

column3: types 買了 then 3 then 個 (no space keyed)
column5: Faithful transcription: no auto-space at Han↔number boundary (SPACE-no-autospace).

column3: types 下午 then 3 then 點半
column5: Digit sandwiched between Han runs stays glued and half-width.

column3: types 買了 2 箱可樂，共 300 元。 (no spaces keyed; comma+period keyed in Han run)
column5: Half-width digits; fullwidth ，。 because the marks belong to the Chinese clause; no autospace around digits.
MOTIVATING BUG. Hyphen flanked by digits is the literal '-', never zhuyin ㄦ; whole run is one passthrough token. Wrong=7兒11.
Letter+hyphen+digit is one atomic literal token. Wrong=GPT兒4.
衛福部 usage: half-width hyphen inside acronym-number token. Wrong=COVID兒19.
Internal '.' stays literal, never fullwidth 。 and never zhuyin ㄡ.

column3: types 3 then [ㄡ/':' or ';' key for colon] then 30
column5: Time colon inside a number run is half-width literal, never fullwidth ：. Wrong=3：30.
English label + user-typed space + half-width ratio; colon literal.
Date slashes stay literal '/', never fullwidth and never zhuyin ㄥ.
Version string is one atomic half-width token; dots literal.
Currency+decimal atomic; '$' and '.' pass through.
Currency prefix glued to digits, all half-width, no split, no autospace.
Percent glued, half-width; no space before %.

column3: types 02 then [ㄦ/'-' key] then 1234 then [ㄦ/'-' key] then 5678
column5: Phone number: every internal hyphen literal, whole run atomic. Wrong=02兒1234兒5678.
URL passthrough verbatim: no fullwidth ：, no fullwidth 。, hyphen not ㄦ. Wrong=https：//example。com/7兒11.
Email atomic; '@' and '.' literal half-width.

column3: types USB then [ㄦ/'-' key] then C
column5: Acronym with hyphen is one literal token. Wrong=USB兒C.

column3: types Wi then [ㄦ/'-' key] then Fi
column5: Hyphenated brand word; hyphen literal, not zhuyin.
Language name atomic; '+' literal half-width.

column3: types 我用 then iPhone (no space keyed after 我用)
column5: Default = faithful transcription: no injected space at Han↔Latin boundary. Wrong=我用 iPhone.

column3: types 我用 then space then iPhone (space keyed)
column5: User-typed space preserved verbatim. Wrong=我用iPhone.

column3: types 我買了 space iPhone space 15 space Pro (spaces keyed inside product name)
column5: Spaces inside a product name are user-typed and preserved; digits half-width.
Preserve typed half-width '~'; do NOT auto-convert to fullwidth ～ and never to ㄦ. Wrong=5～10.

column3: types 5 then [ㄦ/'-' key] then 10 then space then 人
column5: Range hyphen stays literal half-width; separator is never zhuyin. Wrong=5兒10 人.

column3: types 第 then 1 then [ㄦ/'-' key] then 3 then 課
column5: Numeric range embedded between Han; hyphen literal, digits glued to Han. Wrong=第1兒3課.
shopjkl style: two half-width time tokens joined by typed '~'; colons and tilde all literal.

column3: types 溫度是 then [ㄦ/'-' key] then 5 then 度
column5: Hyphen flanked by a non-tone digit on the right merges into the number run as literal '-' (negative sign), not zhuyin ㄦ. Wrong=溫度是兒5度.
Lexicalized letter+Han glued, half-width letter, no pangu space. Wrong=K 書.
Native solid lexeme; never spaced or split (Bobby Tung's T 恤 pollution case).
Letter glued to Han, half-width.
'3C' solid lexeme glued to 產品 in default (no-autospace) mode; a space before 產品 appears only under the opt-in pangu pass. Wrong=3 C 產品.
PTT-native verb lexeme, letters half-width and glued.
Glued letter+Han coinage, no space, no fullwidth.

column3: types 5 then k then 4 then [ㄦ/'-' key] (genuine zhuyin syllable ㄓㄜˋ + ㄦ)
column5: A real zhuyin syllable wins: '-' is ㄦ here because it forms a valid final and no alnum run flanks it. Wrong=5k4-.

column3: types s then m then u then 3 then [ㄦ/'-' key] then 6 (女兒, tone digit not English context)
column5: Tone digit (3/6) does NOT count as English context, so genuine ㄦ final survives. Wrong=smu3-6.

column3: types Expected then [colon key] then space then zhuyin 你好
column5: MOTIVATING BUG. Colon bound to the English label stays half-width ASCII with Western space after. Wrong=Expected：你好.

column3: types TODO then [colon key] then space then zhuyin 買菜
column5: Colon after an English/identifier label is half-width; contrast with a Chinese label.

column3: types 項目 then [colon key] then zhuyin 你好
column5: CONTRAST: colon after a Chinese label is fullwidth ：with no surrounding spaces. Wrong=項目:你好.

column3: types zhuyin 我用的是 then space then Python then [. key]
column5: Sentence-terminal period closing an overall-Chinese sentence goes fullwidth 。 even though the last token is English. Wrong=我用的是 Python.

column3: types zhuyin 他在看 then PTT then [. key]
column5: Terminal '.' after an English token but closing a Chinese sentence → fullwidth 。; PTT glued (no autospace). Wrong=他在看PTT.

column3: commit 'Item 1,' (half-width comma in English run) then later type zhuyin 這是清單
column5: No retroactive re-widening: the committed half-width comma stays half-width even though Chinese follows. Wrong=Item 1，這是清單.

column3: types zhuyin 我用 then passthrough 'iPhone', no space keyed
column5: Han↔Latin boundary: no injected space. Faithful transcription default.

column3: types 我用, a literal space, then 'iPhone'
column5: User-typed space is preserved verbatim.

column3: types zhuyin 買了, digit '3', zhuyin 個 (no spaces)
column5: Number glued to Han on both sides; never 買了 3 個.
Digit hugs surrounding Han.
English embedded mid-Chinese, glued both sides.
English-then-Chinese boundary, no space.
Chinese-then-English boundary at line end, no trailing/leading space.
Ordinal digit glued.
Number run then Han unit, no space.

column3: types 我買了, space, 'iPhone', space, '15', space, 'Pro'
column5: All user-typed internal spaces in the product name preserved exactly.
Chinese-English-Chinese sandwich, glued.
Number+Han-unit glued; pangu might space these but default does not.

column3: types passthrough 'hello world' with a keyed space between the two words
column5: Space inside an English run is user-typed and kept.
Stored text stays glued; any ~1/4-em optical gap is the layout engine's job, never an ASCII 0x20 baked into the stream.

column3: stored text for 第3名 as emitted by the IME
column5: No half-em breakable ASCII space inserted to represent the typographic gap.

column3: types 剛買了一部, 'iPhone', fullwidth comma key, 好開心, fullwidth ! key
column5: Fullwidth ，！ hug neighbors with zero surrounding spaces even where English abuts the comma.

column3: types 他說, fullwidth colon key, corner-bracket open, 'hello', corner-bracket close
column5: No space after ： or inside 「」 around the English word.

column3: types 用, 'Python', fullwidth comma, 很方便, fullwidth period
column5: Fullwidth comma glued after English token; no space before it.
English inside Taiwan corner brackets, no padding spaces.
Fullwidth dash carries own side-bearing; no surrounding space.

column3: types 等等, ellipsis key, 好吧
column5: Fullwidth ellipsis, no spaces.

column3: types 我用的是, space, 'Python', sentence-terminal period key (Chinese sentence)
column5: User typed a space before Python (kept); terminal 。 is fullwidth and hugs Python with no space before it.
Motivating bug: atomic literal token, hyphen never becomes ㄦ and no space is injected around it — never 7 兒 11 nor 7 - 11.

column3: English label 'Expected', colon key, space, zhuyin 你好
column5: Motivating bug: halfwidth colon hugs the English label with Western spacing (space after, none before); not fullwidth ：and not double-spaced.
Acronym-number literal glued into surrounding Han, internal hyphen literal, no injected spaces.
Percent glued; no space before % and none at the Han boundaries.
Time literal with halfwidth colon; no space injected before the following Han.
URL is one passthrough token; no spaces injected at Han boundaries and separators stay literal.
Native letter+Han lexeme AA制 written solid; no pangu space.
T恤 glued; pangu would wrongly split to T 恤.
3C solid; under default no-autospace 產品 is also glued (space before 產品 only under opt-in pangu).

column3: OPT-IN PANGU pass applied to finished text 在LeanCloud上
column5: Only the opt-in whole-buffer beautifier produces this; it is NOT the keystream default.
Even under pangu, no space before ° (or %).

column3: OPT-IN PANGU pass applied to lexeme K書
column5: Pangu must not split lexicalized glued letter+Han coinages.

column3: types passthrough 'hello', no trailing zhuyin, then later types zhuyin 世界 as a NEW commit
column5: No retroactive space inserted at the boundary when Chinese arrives after an already-committed English run.
